sections.text: Enter your BigCommerce API credentials below.

sections.label: Store Hash
sections.hint: Your BigCommerce store hash, found in your Big Commerce subdomain (e.g. https://store-{store_hash}.mybigcommerce.com/manage/dashboard)

sections.label: Orders Limit
sections.hint: Maximum number of recent orders to retrieve per customer. Defaults to 10 if not set.

sections.label: Access Token

input.placeholder: Enter your BigCommerce API access token

sections.hint: The token must have read access to Customers, Orders, and Order Transactions.
